name: Booker T. Jones
description:
'''Booker Taliaferro Jones Jr.''' (born November 12, 1944) is an American musician, songwriter, record producer and arranger, best known as the frontman of the band [[Booker T. & the M.G.'s]]. He has also worked as a [[session musician]] with many well-known artists of the 20th and 21st centuries, earning him a [[Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award|Grammy Award for Lifetime Achievement.]]

With the death of guitarist [[Steve Cropper]] on December 3, 2025, Jones is the last surviving original member of Booker T. & the M.G.’s.
